raw.n: Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class

holdings.n: Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class

holdings.infoBox: PIPE is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Targa Resources stock at 7.77%, The Williams Companies at 6.34%, TC Energy at 6.14%, Plains GP Holdings at 6.03%, and Kodiak Gas Services at 4.95%.

overview.description: The Invesco SteelPath MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF (PIPE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of North American energy infrastructure stocks and midstream MLPs. Holdings are selected and weighted based on macrotrends and fundamental criteria, to pursue stable income with preferred tax treatment. PIPE was launched on Feb 20, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.
